tags.name: uui-badge
tags.description: A badge to notify that there is something that requires attention of the user. The badge is positioned with `position: absolute`. It will determine its position against the first ancestor with `position: relative`.

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Changes the look of the button to one of the predefined, symbolic looks. For example - set this to positive if you want nice, green "confirm" button.

attributes.name: look
attributes.description: Changes the look of the button to one of the predefined, symbolic looks. For example - set this to positive if you want nice, green "confirm" button.

attributes.name: attention
attributes.description: Bring attention to this badge by applying a bounce animation.

properties.name: color
properties.description: Changes the look of the button to one of the predefined, symbolic looks. For example - set this to positive if you want nice, green "confirm" button.

properties.name: look
properties.description: Changes the look of the button to one of the predefined, symbolic looks. For example - set this to positive if you want nice, green "confirm" button.

properties.name: attention
properties.description: Bring attention to this badge by applying a bounce animation.
